title: Apotheosis Ascended
description: Addon mod for Apotheosis adding compatibility and integration with other mods
body:
NEEDS ADDITIONAL ATTRIBUTES! [https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-attributes](https://modrinth.com/mod/additional-attributes)

This mod aims to adds compatibility and integration between Apotheosis and other mods. It currently adds custom gems for Iron's Spells and Spellbooks that boost spell power and unlock spells.

Main integrated mods (mob, gem, and loot integrations):

Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
Cataclysm 
Galosphere 
Alex's Caves 
Bygone Nether 
Friends and Foes 
Enderman Overhaul

Other integrated mods (mainly just affix loot integrations):

Farmer's Delight
Delightful
End's Delight
AE2
Quark 
Autumnity 
Create: Dreams and Desires

Roadmap / planned featuers: https://github.com/meeprdib/Apotheosis-Ascended/issues

Credits:

Ace - Artist

If you want to check out my other projects, join my Discord! https://discord.gg/FUE54wUMHz
